subject: Re: HAPPY BIRTHDAY!
body:
thanks


----- Original Message ----
From: Cecilia Steen <cecilia.steen@gmail.com>
To: JE <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, January 19, 2007 10:03:41 PM
Subject: HAPPY BIRTHDAY!


I wish you a great day and a fabulous year to come! 
 
Of course I always value your opinion, Jeffrey! I would never want you to sign something you didn't agree with. Darren's letter will of course be great. Sorry for the inconvenience and I'm always very thankful! 
 
I had an apartment mishap and learned never to trust a Russian real estate broker! For a while I feared I would be homeless for a week, but it all worked out. 
 
I have three more interviews next week for private equity. I'm learning the rules of Middle Eastern business etiquette, and I don't think they've heard of sexual haressment here...  ;) 
 
Much love,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062


 
____________________________________________________________________________________

thanks
